sections.paragraph:
fut. יִסַּח to pluck out,-(a) any one from his house, Psa 52:7 from the land, i.e. to drive into exile, Pro 2:22.-(b) used of a house, i.e. to destroy, Pro 15:25 men and houses, like plants, are said both to be planted and plucked up; compare נָטַע and נָתַשׁ.

Niphal to be plucked up, i.e. expelled (from a land), Deu 28:63.

Derivative מַסָּח.
